input: Sarah has 15 apples. She gives 7 to her friend. How many does she have left?
A store has 24 shirts. If each shirt costs 12 dollars, what is the total cost?
Tom has 3 boxes with 8 pencils each. How many pencils does he have in total?
A pizza is cut into 8 slices. If 3 people each eat 2 slices, how many slices are left?
Maria has 50 dollars. She buys a book for 12 dollars and a pen for 3 dollars. How much money does she have left?
A train travels 60 miles per hour. How far will it travel in 5 hours?
If you have 36 cookies and want to share them equally among 9 friends, how many does each friend get?
A farmer has 45 cows. He buys 18 more. How many cows does he have now?
Lisa reads 12 pages per day. How many pages will she read in 2 weeks?
A box contains 144 eggs. If you take out 6 dozen, how many eggs remain?
John has 100 dollars. He spends 25 dollars on lunch and 30 on a shirt. How much is left?
A classroom has 5 rows of desks with 6 desks in each row. How many desks are there?
If a car uses 4 gallons of gas to travel 120 miles, how many miles per gallon does it get?
Amy scored 85, 92, and 78 on three tests. What is her total score?
A rope is 200 centimeters long. If you cut it into 4 equal pieces, how long is each piece?
There are 18 red balls and 12 blue balls. How many balls are there in total?
A baker makes 15 cakes per day. How many cakes in 7 days?
Mike has 72 stickers. He gives away 28. How many does he keep?
A jar has 500 marbles. You remove 135. How many are left?
If 5 notebooks cost 20 dollars, how much does one notebook cost?
Emma has 3 bags of candy with 25 pieces in each bag. How many pieces total?
A garden has 8 rows with 9 flowers each. How many flowers in total?
The temperature was 68 degrees and dropped 15 degrees. What is it now?
Dad is 42 years old. Mom is 5 years younger. How old is Mom?
A concert has 250 seats. If 178 tickets are sold, how many seats remain?
You buy 6 bottles of water at 2 dollars each. What's the total cost?
A parking lot has 300 spaces. 215 are taken. How many are empty?
Sam runs 3 miles every day. How many miles does he run in 4 weeks?
A class of 32 students is split into groups of 4. How many groups are there?
You have 95 dollars and earn 45 more. How much do you have?
A flag is 4 feet wide and 6 feet long. What is the area?
There were 408 people at a movie. 129 left early. How many stayed?
A truck carries 16 boxes. Each box weighs 25 pounds. What is the total weight?
Jenny saves 15 dollars per week. How much will she save in 8 weeks?
A building has 12 floors with 8 apartments each. How many apartments total?
You started with 1000 points and lost 367. How many points do you have?
A store sold 45 units on Monday and 62 on Tuesday. How many total?
If you divide 156 stickers equally among 12 children, how many does each get?
A pool has 10000 liters. 3500 liters are drained. How much is left?
Three friends split a 27 dollar bill equally. How much does each pay?
A bus can carry 48 passengers. If there are 3 buses, how many passengers total?
An apple costs 75 cents. How much do 8 apples cost in dollars?
A rectangle has a perimeter of 40 cm. The width is 8 cm. What is the length?
You have 200 photos and delete 89. How many remain?
A school has 600 students. One third are in kindergarten. How many are in kindergarten?
A recipe needs 3 cups of flour. You want to make 7 batches. How many cups needed?
James collected 47 shells on Saturday and 35 on Sunday. How many total?
A DVD costs 15 dollars. How much for a dozen DVDs?
A tank holds 250 gallons. It is half full. How many gallons are in it?
Bob ate 3 slices of a 12-slice pizza. What fraction did he eat times 100?
A train has 9 cars with 50 seats each. How many seats in total?
You earn 8 dollars per hour and work 6 hours. How much do you earn?
There are 52 weeks in a year. How many weeks in 3 years?
A square has a side of 7 cm. What is its area?
Lucy has 84 beads. She makes necklaces with 12 beads each. How many necklaces?
A bike costs 250 dollars. You have 175. How much more do you need?
A package weighs 5 kg. How much do 14 packages weigh?
You read 30 pages today and 45 yesterday. How many pages total?
A garden uses 4 liters of water per day. How much in 30 days?
A movie is 150 minutes long. How many hours and minutes is that? Answer in minutes.
Add 456 and 789.
Subtract 234 from 1000.
Multiply 25 by 16.
Divide 360 by 12.
What is 15 percent of 200?
A triangle has a base of 10 cm and height of 6 cm. What is the area?
If you save 50 dollars per month, how much in a year?
A dozen eggs costs 3 dollars. How much do 5 dozen cost?
You have 10 coins of 25 cents each. How much in dollars?
A wall is 15 feet wide and 10 feet tall. What is the area?
A car travels 55 mph for 4 hours. What distance does it cover?
You buy 3 items at 7, 13, and 20 dollars. What is the total?
There are 365 days in a year. How many days in 2 years?
A pool fills at 500 liters per hour. How long to fill 3000 liters?
What is 7 times 8?
You have 4 quarters and 3 dimes. How many cents total?
A bookshelf has 5 shelves with 20 books each. How many books total?
Subtract 67 from 200.
A factory produces 350 units per day. How many in 5 days?
What is half of 846?
A circle has a diameter of 10 cm. What is the radius?
You score 90, 85, 95, and 80 on four tests. What is the total?
A toy costs 8 dollars. Tax is 1 dollar. What is the total for 5 toys?
180 divided by 9 equals what?
A field is 100 meters by 50 meters. What is the perimeter?
You have 1500 and spend 375. Then you earn 200. How much do you have?
What is 11 times 11?
A pack has 48 crayons. You use 19. How many are left?
If you walk 2.5 miles each day, how far in 10 days?
A plant grows 3 cm per week. How tall after 8 weeks?
There are 28 students. 7 are absent. How many are present?
Multiply 125 by 8.
A cake is divided into 10 slices. 4 people each take 2 slices. How many are left?
You have 999 and add 1. What do you get?
What is 20 percent of 500?

How many minutes are in 3 hours?
What is 144 divided by 12?
You walk 4 blocks north and 3 blocks south. How many blocks from start?
